name: Martin Short
blurb: A manic character comedian from SCTV and SNL.
bio: Martin Short is a Canadian-American comedian and actor who broke out on SCTV and Saturday Night Live with characters like the sweat-soaked Ed Grimley, and later created the unfiltered celebrity interviewer Jiminy Glick. He continues to star on stage, film, and Only Murders in the Building.

appearances.t: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon

flags.note: Added 2026-06-17 discovery pass (expanded comedy-bit scope): minimum profile = bio + headshot + one verified clip; deepen via the audit game.
